goomba.description: Short, ground-dwelling brown creature with a scowling face and triangular white eyes - goomba

red_koopa.description: Bipedal yellow turtle with a prominent red shell, large head, and oval eyes - red koopa

buzzy_beetle.description: Short, ground-dwelling black-skinned creature encased in a smooth, domed blue shell - buzzy beetle

red_koopa_paratroopa.description: Bipedal yellow turtle with a red shell, large oval eyes, and a pair of white fluttering wings - red koopa paratroopa

green_koopa_paratroopa.description: Bipedal yellow turtle with a green shell, large oval eyes, and a pair of white fluttering wings - green koopa paratroopa

piranha_plant.description: Stationary green botanical enemy with a wide, toothy maw, emerging upward from a green pipe - piranha plant

green_koopa.description: Bipedal yellow turtle with a prominent green shell, large head, and oval eyes - koopa green koopa

hammer_bro.description: Aggressive, standing bipedal turtle wearing a white and blue helmet, actively throwing projectiles - hammer bro

lakitu.description: Bespectacled, green-faced creature hovering inside a smiling, white puffy cloud - lakitu

spiny.description: Small, quadrupedal red creature covered in sharp, prominent white spikes across its back - spiny

bowser.description: Large, green, reptilian boss with a spiked shell, orange hair, and a roaring fire-breathing mouth - bowser

mushroom_powerup.description: Consumable item with a short white stalk and a bright orange-red cap adorned with white spots - mushroom powerup

fire_flower_powerup.description: Stationary flower with a central face, surrounded by alternating blinking petals of white, orange, and red - fire flower powerup

star_powerup.description: Dynamic, five-pointed star icon with eyes, continuously blinking between yellow and orange hues - start powerup

one_up_powerup.description: Consumable item with a short white stalk and a distinct bright green cap adorned with white spots - one up powerup

coin.description: Small, gleaming gold oval or circular currency item with a distinctive inner marking - coin

jump.description: jump hop leap bounce spring vault rise up

run.description: run sprint dash go fast hurry

move left.description: move left backwards go left back retreat

move right.description: move right forwards go right advance proceed

track.description: going to an enemy's location follow chase pursue target

fireball.description: shoot a pellet of fire throw fireball

duck.description: duck or crouch down or get into a pipe

run left.description: run left sprint left hold left sustain left

run right.description: run right sprint right hold right sustain right

hold left.description: hold left go back keep sustained maintain constant

hold right.description: hold right go forward keep sustained maintain constant

mash jump.description: mash jump repeatedly spam tap hit many times attack spam

mash fireball.description: mash punch repeatedly spam tap hit many times attack spam fireball

stop.description: stop cease halt end quit finish cancel pause done
